sn35.82:1.1:
1
Then a certain bhikkhu approached the Blessed One … and said to him: "Venerable sir, it is said, ‘the world, the world.’ In what way, venerable sir, is it said ‘the world’?"
sn35.82:1.2:
2
"It is disintegrating, bhikkhu, therefore it is called the world.
And what is disintegrating? The eye, bhikkhu, is disintegrating, forms are disintegrating, eye-consciousness is disintegrating, eye-contact is disintegrating, and whatever feeling arises with eye-contact as condition … that too is disintegrating. The ear is disintegrating … The mind is disintegrating … Whatever feeling arises with mind-contact as condition … that too is disintegrating. It is disintegrating, bhikkhu, therefore it is called the world."
